name: Snickerdoodles Light
recipeInstructions:
Preheat oven to 350 degrees. Coat two cookie sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
Beat margarine and 1 3/4 cups sugar in an electric mixer until fluffy.
Add milk, egg, and egg whites; beat again.
Add flour, cream of tartar, baking soda, and salt; beat until well mixed.
Combine remaining 1/4 cup sugar and cinnamon in a shallow dish or bowl.
Shape dough into 1-inch balls and roll in cinnamon sugar to coat all sides.
Dough will be sticky. If too difficult to handle, slightly flour hands.
Arrange dough balls on sheets and flatten with fingers or back of spoon.
Bake for 8-10 minutes, until lightly browned.
Cool cookies on sheets for 5 minutes before transferring to wire racks to cool completely.
